title: YesSnepieSpider's pvp pack
description: A all in one pvp pack made from the vanilla+-3d crystal pack in 16x.
body:
This texture pack contains all in one feature for pvp.
Credits:"Marlow" and her vanilla+-3d crystal pvp pack.
I made it 16x from deifferent texture packs and combined them for the best experience.
Contains:3d crystal,classic netherite armor,no fire,lower shield etc.
Some item textures are 32x like axe.
They wil be replaced very soon as I get a perfect textures :).
Also it's a fan made pack for Marlow.
If you have any Ideas that could be useful for this pack or pvp,join discord.Also you can dm me:YesSnepieSpider
